历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10385 → 11205 → 9800 → 8598, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking number = intensified competition), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1462 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8598, the best level in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 35 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; for 2026, the Physics Category plan is 26 and the Medical Category plan is 7, totaling 33, an increase of about 13.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 46th (44th in 2021 → 40th in 2023 → 46th in 2025 → 46th in 2026), with rankings stable in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but in 2024 it received a somewhat positive evaluation (cafeteria improvements); Douyin popularity ranking is 46/106, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure; no significant admission cutoff gaps have been observed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University received 2 disciplines rated A- or above: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-; although majors like Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, and Materials Science do not directly correspond to A- ratings, the overall strength of related disciplines is relatively strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Clinical Medicine offered by Soochow University in Hunan continue to be highly popular and recommended; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025 and is estimated to be about 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4% year-on-year, intensifying competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is relatively stable, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8598, an enrollment increase of about 13.8% in 2026, an increase of about 8.4% in the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 9340, and a range of 8840–9840.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 苏州大学医学类在湖南省近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年2255名（计划9人）、2022年11574名（计划9人）、2023年18462名（计划4人）、2024年17398名（计划6人）、20 25年10468名（计划8人）。2023年因计划大幅缩减至4人，位次骤降至18462名；随后2024年扩至6人、2025年扩至8人，位次持续回升至10468名。2026年医学类计划为7人，较2025 年减少1人（缩招12.5%），同时专业结构发生重大调整：新增口腔医学（2人），取消了预防医学、放射医学、护理学、法医学等专业，仅保留临床医学（5+3一体化，3人）和临 床医学（2人）。缩招对位次有下行压力（更易进），但专业整体层次上移对位次有上行支撑。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，位于江苏省苏州市，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学教育历史悠久，临床医学、放射医学等专业在华东地区享有较高声 誉，对湖南考生具有较强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来全国报考热度持续上升，临床医学（5+3一体化）作为本硕连读培养模式，一直是高分考生的热门选择。2026年新增的口腔医学专业同样是医学类中的热门方向 ，预计将吸引更多优质生源。苏州地处长三角经济发达区域，城市吸引力强，进一步提升了苏州大学医学类专业的报考热度。湖南省内医学招生规模有限，竞争较为激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与专业结构调整因素，预测2026年苏州大学医学类在湖南省最低录取位次约为9883名，较2025年（10468名）略有上升（更难进），波动区间预计在9389至1037 7名之间。建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical programs in Hunan Province over the past five years have fluctuated significantly: 2021: 2255 (plan: 9), 2022: 11574 (plan: 9), 2023: 18462 (plan: 4), 2024: 17398 (plan: 6), 2025: 10468 (plan: 8). In 2023, due to a sharp reduction in the plan to 4, the ranking plummeted to 18462; subsequently, in 2024, the plan expanded to 6, and in 2025, to 8, with the ranking continuously recovering to 10468. The 2026 medical plan is 7, a decrease of 1 from 2025 (a 12.5% reduction), along with a major adjustment in program structure: the addition of Stomatology (2), and the cancellation of Preventive Medicine, Radiation Medicine, Nursing, and Forensic Medicine, retaining only Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated, 3) and Clinical Medicine (2). The reduction in enrollment exerts downward pressure on rankings (easier to enter), but the overall upward shift in program tiers provides upward support.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical education has a long history, and programs such as Clinical Medicine and Radiation Medicine enjoy high reputations in the East China region, exerting strong appeal to Hunan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the national application popularity for medical programs has been continuously rising. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated), as a combined bachelor's and master's program, has always been a popular choice among high-scoring candidates. The newly added Stomatology program in 2026 is also a popular direction in medicine, expected to attract more high-quality students. Suzhou, located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, has strong urban appeal, further enhancing the application popularity of Soochow University's medical programs. The medical enrollment scale within Hunan Province is limited, leading to intense competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Integrating the supply-demand elasticity model and program structure adjustment factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical programs in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 9883, a slight increase (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (10468), with a fluctuation range expected between 9389 and 10377. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.

Since Preventive Medicine, Nursing, and other relatively low-score programs have been canceled in 2026, the overall admission threshold may shift upward, and low-score candidates should fill in cautiously.
